steps: File tax reclaim with ATO for AUD 138,750 overpaid withholding tax on BHP Group Ltd dividends under AU-NO treaty 15% rate
Submit Citigroup Australia statement and Norwegian tax residency certificate to support treaty benefit claim
Reference AU-NO treaty Article 10 specifying 15% maximum withholding rate for portfolio dividends to Norwegian residents
Follow up with Citigroup Australia to ensure proper treaty rate application for future BHP dividend payments

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
